# FinanceCraftedSheets

## About
Professional Excel and Google Sheets templates for budgeting, debt payoff, investing, and financial planning. Available on Etsy.

## Products

### Budgeting Templates
- Monthly Budget Planner ($4.99) - Track income and expenses monthly
- 50/30/20 Budget Spreadsheet ($4.99) - Apply the simple budgeting framework
- Savings Goal Tracker ($4.99) - Track multiple savings goals with progress bars
- Travel Budget Planner ($4.99) - Plan and track vacation spending

### Expense Tracking
- Freelancer Expense Tracker ($4.99) - Tax-ready business expense tracking
- Subscription Tracker ($3.99) - Find and cut recurring charges
- Side Hustle Income Tracker ($3.99) - Track gig economy earnings

### Investing & Debt
- Debt Payoff Calculator ($6.99) - Snowball and avalanche payoff plans
- Investment Portfolio Tracker ($6.99) - Track stocks, ETFs, and funds
- Net Worth Tracker ($6.99) - Monitor your total financial picture

### Special Purpose
- Wedding Budget Spreadsheet ($6.99) - Plan your wedding without overspending
- Ultimate Finance Bundle ($14.99) - All 11 templates at 60% off
